description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the 5.x branch and on pull requests to that branch. The workflow has two jobs: one for continuous integration (CI) on a matrix of operating systems and libvips versions, and another for publishing Docker images. The CI job checks out the repository, caches libvips, installs dependencies, builds and installs libvips if necessary, prepares the environment, builds the project, runs unit and integration tests, and uploads coverage to Codecov if enabled. The docker-publish job builds and pushes Docker images to GitHub Container Registry.
